subcodes.first_line: The Book which the Lord of Eternity hath sent down, that He may draw the nations nigh unto the Most Exalted Horizon, that Station wherefrom the Call of God hath been raised [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مالک القدم لیقرب الامم الی الافق الاعلی المقام الذی فیه ارتفع ندآء الله
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
